subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of the Kingdom of Names! Hearken unto the Call from this Station which God hath made [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضا علیک بهاءالله مالک ملکوت الاسماء اسمع الندآء من هذا المقام الذی جعله الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
